# agentops_policy (Resource)

An authorization policy: a named collection of capability grants.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "agentops_policy" "deploy" {
  name        = "deploy-policy"
  description = "Grants deploy capabilities"

  # grants is a free-form JSON array of grant definitions.
  grants = jsonencode([
    { capability = "agents:deploy", resource_type = "agent" },
  ])
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Human-readable policy name.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Free-form policy description.
- `grants` (String) Capability grants attached to the policy, encoded as JSON.

### Read-Only

- `builtin` (Boolean) Whether the policy is a built-in policy managed by the system.
- `created_at` (String) Timestamp at which the policy was created.
- `id` (String) Policy identifier.
